root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_group_control_name, PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ) as age, pka_mem.fp_desc_position(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code ) as position_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id,
sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code ,
sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id , sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount ,
sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount , '!approve_date_1!' as approve_date_at, '!approve_date_2!' as approve_date_to , sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_id
,sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.application_fee
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_position , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_com_m_branch , sc_mem_m_application_form ,sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type ,sc_mem_m_member_own_info WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_own_info.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_own_info.first_date <= sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
